features.heading: Experience
features.artistsDesc: Learn from over 50 international champions flying in from Cuba, Spain, and Italy.
features.beachDesc: Dance until the sun comes up on the beautiful golden sands of Varna's central beach.
features.communityDesc: Whether you are a pro or a beginner, our community welcomes everyone with open arms.

cta.title: DON'T MISS OUT!
cta.desc: Join thousands of dancers from around the world in Varna. Secure your pass today!

passes.partyDesc: Full access to all night parties from Friday to Sunday.
passes.fullDesc: Includes all workshops, bootcamps, and all night parties.
passes.dayDesc: Access to Saturday workshops and the Gala party.

Terms.s1Text: By purchasing a ticket, registering an account, or attending Summer Salsa Fest Varna, you agree to abide by these Terms and Conditions. Please read them carefully.
Terms.s2Text: All ticket sales are final. We do not offer refunds under any circumstances, including personal emergencies or travel disruptions. However, you may transfer your ticket to another person up to 14 days before the event through your account dashboard.
Terms.s3Text: Summer Salsa Fest is dedicated to providing a safe, inclusive, and harassment-free experience for everyone. Any form of harassment, discrimination, or aggressive behavior on the dance floor or at the venues will result in immediate removal from the festival without a refund.
Terms.s4Text: Guest Dancers (Ambassadors) are approved at the sole discretion of the organizers. Misuse of the ambassador portal, including selling tickets at unauthorized discounts or fraudulent group creation, will result in permanent bans and ticket cancellations.
Terms.s5Text: By attending the festival, you consent to being filmed and photographed by our official media team. Summer Salsa Fest reserves the right to use this media for future promotional purposes across our website and social media without compensation.
Terms.s6Text: The organizers, Varna Free University, and Kabakum Beach venues are not liable for any personal injury, loss, or damage to belongings during the event. Attendees assume all risks associated with participation in dance activities.

Privacy.s1Text: Welcome to the Summer Salsa Festival. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website, purchase tickets, or apply to be a Guest Dancer.
Privacy.s2Li1Text: When you register, we collect your name, email address, and securely store your authentication credentials via Google Firebase.
Privacy.s2Li2Text: When you purchase a pass, we record your ticket ID, pass type, and purchase history. (Payment details are handled securely by our payment processors and are not stored on our servers).
Privacy.s2Li3Text: Information provided through our Contact Form or Guest Dancer applications (including phone numbers, social handles, and personal pitches).
Privacy.s3Text: We use your information strictly to provide and improve our festival experience:
Privacy.s3Li1: To generate, manage, and verify your event tickets.
Privacy.s3Li2: To respond to your inquiries and evaluate Guest Dancer applications.
Privacy.s3Li3: To send you important updates regarding the festival schedule or your account.
Privacy.s4Text: We use local storage and cookies to ensure our website functions properly and to understand how visitors interact with our platform.
Privacy.s4Box1Text: These are required for the website to function (e.g., keeping you logged securely into your account). They cannot be switched off.
Privacy.s4Box2Text: If you click "Accept All" on our cookie banner, we load third-party scripts (like Google Analytics and Meta Pixel) to help us measure site traffic and deliver relevant ads. You can opt-out by selecting "Essential Only".
Privacy.s5Text: Your security is our priority. Our database is powered by Google Firebase, utilizing industry-standard encryption and strict security rules. Only authorized administrators can access sensitive festival data. We will never sell your personal data to third parties.
Privacy.s6Text: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to request the deletion of your account data, please reach out to us at:

Cookies.s1Text: Cookies are small text files placed on your device when you visit our website. They help us remember your preferences, keep your session secure, and understand how you interact with our platform.
Cookies.s2Text: Summer Salsa Fest uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience, manage your ticket cart, and analyze website traffic to improve our festival marketing.
Cookies.s3Box1Text: These cookies are essential for the website to function properly. They enable core features like logging into your account, adding passes to your cart, and secure checkout. They cannot be disabled.
Cookies.s3Box2Text: These cookies help us track visitor metrics (like which pages are most popular) using tools like Google Analytics. This data is aggregated and anonymous. You can opt out of these via our Cookie Banner.
Cookies.s4Text: You can change your cookie preferences at any time by clearing your browser data or by adjusting your browser settings to block third-party cookies.
Cookies.s5Text: If you have any questions regarding our use of cookies, please contact us at:

Info.sch1Desc: Masterclasses with over 50 international champions across 4 massive dance halls.
Info.sch2Desc: Cool down from the workshops with cocktails and social dancing right on the sand.
Info.sch3Desc: Spectacular shows, live bands, and social dancing across multiple rooms until sunrise.
Info.faq1q: Do I need a partner to attend?
Info.faq1a: Not at all! Summer Salsa Fest is incredibly social. During workshops, we constantly rotate partners, and during the parties, everyone dances with everyone.
Info.faq2q: How do I get to Varna Free University?
Info.faq2a: The university is located just outside the city center. We recommend taking bus lines 409 or 9, which drop you off right near the campus. Taxis are also very affordable!
Info.faq3a: Yes! We have dedicated bootcamps and beginner-friendly tracks happening every single day. Look for the 'Green Track' on the official schedule.
Info.faq4a: Dance shoes (of course), swimwear for the beach socials, comfortable daytime clothes for workshops, and your best outfits for the evening gala parties!

Gallery.heroDesc: Relive the energy, the music, and the beautiful moments from our previous editions.

About.storyTitle: From a Dance Floor Dream to a Global Festival
About.storyP1: It all started in 2012 with a simple but powerful dream. Mimi and Marto, the passionate founders of the 'Malambo' dance school, wanted to create something more than just another dance event.
About.storyP2: They envisioned a festival where the global dance community could unite under the Bulgarian sun. A place where world-class instruction meets the warmth of a family, and where the parties don't stop until the sun comes up over the Black Sea.
About.storyP3: Fourteen years later, Summer Salsa Fest Varna has grown into one of the most anticipated events of the year. While the festival has expanded to host thousands of dancers and over 50 international champions, the core mission remains exactly the same as it was on day one: pure love for the music, authentic connection, and sharing the magic of the dance floor.
About.connectDesc: Follow our journey, watch our favorite memories, and join the official event groups below to stay updated on the 2026 edition!

AmbassadorDashboard.infoDesc: Welcome to the Ambassador Portal! Here is a quick guide to managing your attendees.
AmbassadorDashboard.infoDesc1: Add rows, input legal names, and select pass types. Changes save automatically.
AmbassadorDashboard.infoDesc2: Click and drag your mouse across the checkboxes to rapidly select multiple rows to delete.
AmbassadorDashboard.infoDesc3: When your draft is ready, send it to the cart to checkout securely via Stripe.
AmbassadorDashboard.infoDesc4: Go to the "Paid History" tab to open confirmed tickets and email them to your attendees.
AmbassadorDashboard.errMissingMsg: Please fill in all names or delete empty rows.
AmbassadorDashboard.errCartMsg: Your drafted group has been moved to your cart.
